## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible impact in a few sentences.

## Why

Explain the problem this PR solves or the motivation behind the change.

## Testing

List the checks you ran locally and anything reviewers should pay attention to.

## Checks

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff format .`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Docs/examples updated if needed
